'''dhozagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgeable|judgeable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgeable|judgeable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhozagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozagithi|dhozagithi]] || [[word:dhozagiji|dhozagiji]] || [[word:dhozagishi|dhozagishi]] || [[word:dhozagiki|dhozagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozaguthuthu|dhozaguthuthu]] || [[word:dhozagujuju|dhozagujuju]] || [[word:dhozagushushu|dhozagushushu]] || [[word:dhozagukuku|dhozagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozaguthu|dhozaguthu]] || [[word:dhozaguju|dhozaguju]] || [[word:dhozagushu|dhozagushu]] || [[word:dhozaguku|dhozaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozagufthuf|dhozagufthuf]] || [[word:dhozagufjuf|dhozagufjuf]] || [[word:dhozagufshuf|dhozagufshuf]] || [[word:dhozagufkuf|dhozagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozagethe|dhozagethe]] || [[word:dhozageje|dhozageje]] || [[word:dhozageshe|dhozageshe]] || [[word:dhozageke|dhozageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozagothotho|dhozagothotho]] || [[word:dhozagojojo|dhozagojojo]] || [[word:dhozagoshosho|dhozagoshosho]] || [[word:dhozagokoko|dhozagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozagotho|dhozagotho]] || [[word:dhozagojo|dhozagojo]] || [[word:dhozagosho|dhozagosho]] || [[word:dhozagoko|dhozagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozagofthof|dhozagofthof]] || [[word:dhozagofjof|dhozagofjof]] || [[word:dhozagofshof|dhozagofshof]] || [[word:dhozagofkof|dhozagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozagĂŠthĂŠ|dhozagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozagĂŠjĂŠ|dhozagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozagĂŠshĂŠ|dhozagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozagĂŠkĂŠ|dhozagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozagathatha|dhozagathatha]] || [[word:dhozagajaja|dhozagajaja]] || [[word:dhozagashasha|dhozagashasha]] || [[word:dhozagakaka|dhozagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozagatha|dhozagatha]] || [[word:dhozagaja|dhozagaja]] || [[word:dhozagasha|dhozagasha]] || [[word:dhozagaka|dhozagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozagafthaf|dhozagafthaf]] || [[word:dhozagafjaf|dhozagafjaf]] || [[word:dhozagafshaf|dhozagafshaf]] || [[word:dhozagafkaf|dhozagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhozagasha|dhozagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozagshĂ«sha|dhozagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozagrosha|dhozagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozagmusha|dhozagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozagyasha|dhozagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozagnkshĂ«sha|godhozagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozagnkrosha|godhozagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozagnkmusha|godhozagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozagnkyasha|godhozagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhozazagasha|dhozazagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozazagshĂ«sha|dhozazagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozazagrosha|dhozazagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozazagmusha|dhozazagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozazagyasha|dhozazagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozazagnkshĂ«sha|godhozazagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozazagnkrosha|godhozazagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozazagnkmusha|godhozazagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozazagnkyasha|godhozazagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhezĂŠgasha|dhezĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhezĂŠgshĂ«sha|dhezĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhezĂŠgrosha|dhezĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhezĂŠgmusha|dhezĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhezĂŠgyasha|dhezĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhezĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|godhezĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhezĂŠgnkrosha|godhezĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhezĂŠgnkmusha|godhezĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhezĂŠgnkyasha|godhezĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhozfagasha|dhozfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozfagshĂ«sha|dhozfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozfagrosha|dhozfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozfagmusha|dhozfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozfagyasha|dhozfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozfagnkshĂ«sha|godhozfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozfagnkrosha|godhozfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozfagnkmusha|godhozfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozfagnkyasha|godhozfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
